subcodes.title: Tawqi' Khitab bih ahl-i-bait dar Shiraz
subcodes.first_line: God testifieth that there is none other God but Him, the Mighty, the Best-Beloved. The letter of the Siyyid, dated the eleventh, hath arrived, though previous missives have not been received [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هو الابهی. شهد الله انه لا اله الا هو العزیز المحبوب نوشته سید مورخه ١١ رسید خطوط قبل نرسیده که ظاهر شود
subcodes.subjects: @return of the Manifestations of God, @spiritual transformation, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @laws of God; of the Kitab-i-Aqdas
